name: Liberation
short_description: Liberation is a strategy survival horror game. You have to go to the Deathworld and collect crosses to liberate ghosts. Survive from the attacks of various ghosts!
detailed_description: You are a psychic who helps ghosts liberate. Today, you are going to the place where a terrible incident took place at the request of the clients. In the place where the terrible incident occurred, the door of death opens and the ghosts come through this door. In order to liberate, you must enter the deathworld and collect "cross". The cross serves as a medium to make the ghosts liberate. The ghosts will attack you, and if you are attacked, you will be trapped in the deathworld forever. When you collect all the crosses, the door to the death will open again and you can return to the real world through this door. Please avoid the attacks of the ghosts, collect all the crosses, return to the real world, and make the ghosts liberate!
